headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 28, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the offense with a home run and two RBIs. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 4-2 behind JJ Wetherholt's home run and one RBI. The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays 5-0, with Ranger Suarez pitching 8.0 innings and striking out 10 batters.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries and availability. Tanner Murray, left fielder for the Chicago White Sox, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. Max Scherzer, right-handed pitcher for the Toronto Blue Jays, has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 25, 2026, with right forearm tendinitis and left ankle inflammation. Other notable injuries include Logan O'Hoppe's left wrist fracture and Riley Martin's left elbow inflammation.

The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, who was traded to the team from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded right-handed pitcher Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-handed pitcher Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired third baseman Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash, while the Houston Astros traded shortstop Braden Shewmake to the New York Yankees for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Guardians in Thrilling 3-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a narrow win over the Cleveland Guardians, with a final score of 3-2. Daniel Schneemann led the Rays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with JJ Wetherholt leading the offense with a home run and one RBI. Ryan Fernandez earned the win with 2.0 innings of scoreless relief, striking out four batters.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Shut Out Blue Jays 5-0**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays, securing a 5-0 victory behind a strong performance from Ranger Suarez. Suarez pitched 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing just 1 hit.

top_news.title: **Mariners Fall to Twins in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners suffered a 4-11 loss to the Minnesota Twins, with Kody Clemens leading the Twins' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. Connor Prielipp earned the win for the Twins, pitching 5.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **White Sox Place Tanner Murray on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago White Sox left fielder Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The injury occurred on April 27, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, who was traded to the team from the Texas Rangers for cash.
